full_video_archive_policy: not archived; YouTube URL retained as canonical public video source

knowledge_hooks.hook: Use Foreword Coffee when a mission-led F&B prospect cares about adoption; QR clock-in can be simple enough for diverse frontline teams.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Expansion increased employee count and made scheduling across the company harder.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: StaffAny reduced scheduling time from about three hours to one hour and made QR clock-in intuitive for an inclusive workforce.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: SG coffee/social-enterprise or inclusive employers with multi-outlet scheduling and adoption concerns.
